# Workflow template offer

## When to use

Use when buyer wants implementation help.

## Why it works

Template is low-risk value.

## Mechanism

Solves immediate problem and seeds product usage.

## Required inputs

Download/import template, guided setup.

## When not to use

If template does not connect to product.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Template downloads, product signups.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
